name: Bacon-Onion Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cracker crumbs, walnuts, and butter until well blended.
2. Press crumbs evenly on the bottom of a springform pan.
3. Bake in a pre-heated 350°F oven for 10 minutes. Cool on a rack.
4. Fry bacon until crisp, then crumble it.
5. Saute onion in drippings until tender and set aside.
6. Beat cream cheese until smooth.
7. Gradually add eggs, garlic powder, and cayenne to the cream cheese, beating until smooth.
8. Stir in the bacon and onions.
9. Spoon the mixture into the pan and spread it levelly.
10. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until the cheesecake is almost set and has cracks on top. Cool completely.
11. Store in the refrigerator covered with plastic wrap.
12. Just before serving at room temperature, remove the sides of the pan.
13. Garnish with a circle of shredded carrot around the edge.
14. Place a carrot curl in the center with a sprig of parsley. Serve with crackers or carrot slices.
